item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const map=new Map(); for (const row of data){ const region=row.region; const sku=row.sku; const qty=Number(row.quantity); const rev=Number(row.quantity)*Number(row.unit_price_cents); if("'!map.has(region)) map.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const r=map.get(region); r.qty+=qty; r.rev+=rev; r.skuRev.set(sku,(r.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...map.keys()].sort().map(region=>{ const r=map.get(region); const top=[...r.skuRev.entries()].sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1] || a[0].localeCompare(b[0]))[0][0]; return `${region}|${r.qty}|${r.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const map=new Map(); for (const row of data){ const region=row.region; const sku=row.sku; const qty=Number(row.quantity); const rev=Number(row.quantity)*Number(row.unit_price_cents); if("'!map.has(region)) map.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const r=map.get(region); r.qty+=qty; r.rev+=rev; r.skuRev.set(sku,(r.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...map.keys()].sort().map(region=>{ const r=map.get(region); const top=[...r.skuRev.entries()].sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1] || a[0].localeCompare(b[0]))[0][0]; return `${region}|${r.qty}|${r.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\");const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\"));const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.records||data.orders||data.items||data.transactions||[]);function val(o,n){for(const k of n)if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(o,k))return o[k]}const map=new Map();for(const row of rows){const region=String(val(row,[\"region\",\"Region\",\"REGION\"]));const sku=String(val(row,[\"sku\",\"SKU\",\"product_sku\",\"productSku\"]));const qty=Number(val(row,[\"quantity\",\"qty\",\"Quantity\",\"QTY\",\"units\"]));let revenue=val(row,[\"revenue_cents\",\"revenueCents\",\"total_cents\",\"totalCents\",\"amount_cents\",\"amountCents\"]);if(revenue==null){const unit=Number(val(row,[\"unit_price_cents\",\"unitPriceCents\",\"price_cents\",\"priceCents\",\"unit_price\",\"unitPrice\"]));revenue=qty*unit}else revenue=Number(revenue);if("'!map.has(region))map.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()});const r=map.get(region);r.qty+=qty;r.rev+=revenue;r.skuRev.set(sku,(r.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+revenue)}const answer=[...map.keys()].sort().map(region=>{const r=map.get(region);const top=[...r.skuRev.entries()].sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]||a[0].localeCompare(b[0]))[0][0];return `${region}|${r.qty}|${r.rev}|${top}`});console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer}))'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\");const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\"));const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.records||data.orders||data.items||data.transactions||[]);function val(o,n){for(const k of n)if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(o,k))return o[k]}const map=new Map();for(const row of rows){const region=String(val(row,[\"region\",\"Region\",\"REGION\"]));const sku=String(val(row,[\"sku\",\"SKU\",\"product_sku\",\"productSku\"]));const qty=Number(val(row,[\"quantity\",\"qty\",\"Quantity\",\"QTY\",\"units\"]));let revenue=val(row,[\"revenue_cents\",\"revenueCents\",\"total_cents\",\"totalCents\",\"amount_cents\",\"amountCents\"]);if(revenue==null){const unit=Number(val(row,[\"unit_price_cents\",\"unitPriceCents\",\"price_cents\",\"priceCents\",\"unit_price\",\"unitPrice\"]));revenue=qty*unit}else revenue=Number(revenue);if("'!map.has(region))map.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()});const r=map.get(region);r.qty+=qty;r.rev+=revenue;r.skuRev.set(sku,(r.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+revenue)}const answer=[...map.keys()].sort().map(region=>{const r=map.get(region);const top=[...r.skuRev.entries()].sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]||a[0].localeCompare(b[0]))[0][0];return `${region}|${r.qty}|${r.rev}|${top}`});console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer}))'"'"
